pi_items.verified_value: Real Google Android Sunflower sample project (https://github.com/android/sunflower) - a gardening app demonstrating Android Jetpack best practices
pi_items.source: Web search confirms SunflowerApp is Google's official sample project; setup_task.sh line 18 references it; however, /workspace/data directory structure does not exist on current system (environment-specific path)

privileged_info_summary: The task implements RTL (right-to-left) support in an Android project named GlobalNews, which is based on Google's Android Sunflower sample project. The task requires: (1) enabling android:supportsRtl="true" in the manifest file at app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml; (2) refactoring legacy directional attributes in app/src/main/res/layout/activity_profile.xml from left/right to start/end equivalents (including layout_marginLeft→layout_marginStart, layout_marginRight→layout_marginEnd, paddingLeft→paddingStart, paddingRight→paddingEnd, gravity left/right→start/end, and layout_alignParentLeft/Right→layout_alignParentStart/End); and (3) ensuring the project builds successfully. The Android manifest and layout file paths are correctly specified as relative paths within the project root. The data source references Google's real Sunflower sample project which is available publicly on GitHub.
